mechanism_narrative: Higher federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly reducing present equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rate-hiking periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, triggering immediate risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 returns within one week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 65% of instances when UNRATE crosses the specified threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to produce positive 60d returns in > 55% of historical cases.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth signals supply-side expansion that supports equity valuations, but this mechanism only activates when inflation is below 3%, producing positive 20-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO growth yields negative 20d returns in > 60% of low-inflation periods.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer price inflation outpaces the federal funds rate, negative real yields force markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, generating negative S&P 500 returns within one week.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL month-over-month change exceeds 0.5% while FEDFUNDS remains below 2.0%
failure_condition: The joint condition produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of historical occurrences.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and rising household income, which supports corporate earnings growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC for PAYEMS levels remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in real GDP growth below the 1.0% threshold signals economic stagnation and declining corporate revenues, triggering risk aversion and negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when GDPC1 growth crosses below the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in industrial production and decreases in the unemployment rate confirm a synchronized supply-labor expansion, boosting aggregate demand and yielding positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 60d returns in > 55% of synchronized expansion periods.
